programme.title: Day 4 - CHI Al-Shabaab Grand Prix – Jump Off – 1.60m - CHI AL SHAQAB Presented by Longines 2026
programme.desc: CHI AL SHAQAB presented by Longines 2026, taking place from 18 to 22 February 2026, features world-class equestrian competition at the Al Shaqab venue in Doha. programme.desc: La Liga 2 is the men's second professional association football division of the Spanish football league system. It is contested by 22 teams, with the top two teams plus the winner of a play-off promoted to La Liga and replaced by the three lowest-placed teams in that division.

programme.title: Team – Round 1 - Longines Global Champions Tour - Rome, ITA
programme.desc: The GCL Team Round 1 opens the Rome leg at the Foro Italico. Two riders per squad chase fast, fault-free trips to set the overnight order and carry scores into Round 2. Expect tight time allowed, flowing lines, and smart tactics on stride counts and anchor placement as title contenders push for pole.

programme.title: Team - Round 2 - Longines Global Champions Tour - Rome, ITA
programme.desc: The decisive GCL Team Round 2. Reverse-order start from Round 1, with every rail and second counting toward the combined team total. Strategic rider swaps and cool heads over a technical track shape the podium and precious championship points in a high-stakes Roman finish.

programme.title: CSI5 - Longines Global Champions Tour - Rome, ITA
programme.desc: Top combinations tackle elite CSI5* classes at the Foro Italico. A technical track, tight time allowed and related lines test precision and power, with the fastest clears advancing to a jump-off. Expect fine margins, inside turns and bold strides as riders chase ranking points and momentum for the Grand Prix.

programme.title: Grand Prix of Rome - Longines Global Champions Tour - Rome, ITA
programme.desc: The 1.60m LGCT Grand Prix: one round plus jump-off for big championship points and a golden ticket to the Prague Playoffs Super Grand Prix. Huge oxers, delicate verticals and a demanding time allowed reward brave riding and perfect stride control in a high-stakes Roman finale.

All the best matches are live and exclusive only on beIN.

programme.desc: Extended sit-downs and more informal 'out and about' interviews with the Premier League's biggest names.

programme.title: Real Madrid vs Bayern München - UEFA Champions League 2025/26 - Quarter Finals - 1st leg
programme.desc: Real Madrid v Bayern Munich is already the most-played fixture in major European competition history. All 28 of their meetings have come in the European Cup/UEFA Champions League, with 26 of them taking place in the knockout stages. Bayern Munich are winless in their last nine games against Real Madrid ; they haven’t gone 10+ matches without a win against an opponent across all competitions since the period between 1988 and 1993 versus Werder Bremen.

programme.title: Sporting CP vs Arsenal - UEFA Champions League 2025/26 - Quarter Finals - 1st leg
programme.desc: Sporting CP have never beaten Arsenal in seven attempts, including a 5-1 home loss in last season’s UEFA Champions League. However, they did eliminate Arsenal from the 2022-23 UEFA Europa League via penalty shootout. Arsenal have never won away against Portuguese opposition in the knockout stages of a major European competition before, most recently a 1-0 loss at FC Porto in the 2023-24 UEFA Champions League last 16.

programme.title: UEFA Women's Champions League Highlights 25/26 | QF 2nd Leg
programme.desc: All the action from the latest round of matches in the greatest club competition in women's football.

programme.title: EPL Stories 2025/26 Ep.45 - Victor Moses
programme.desc: Showcasing the personalities who have shaped the Premier League era, in each episode we tell their unique story that will be sure to engage and entertain all fans.

programme.title: Paris Saint-Germain vs Liverpool - UEFA Champions League 2025/26 - Quarter Finals - 1st leg
programme.desc: Paris SG and Liverpool have met on six previous occasions in European competition, with both sides registering three wins each. Their most recent meetings came in the UEFA Champions League last season, where both won 1-0 away from home in the round of 16, before the Parisians won on a penalty shootout at Anfield to progress. In last season’s round of 16 tie between these two sides, Liverpool averaged just 38.6% possession and had 14 fewer shots on target than opponents Paris SG across the two legs ; their biggest negative shot on target differential in a UEFA Champions League knockout stage tie on record.

programme.title: Barcelona vs Atlético de Madrid - UEFA Champions League 2025/26 - Quarter Finals - 1st leg
programme.desc: Barcelona and Atlético Madrid will meet for a fifth time in European competition, with all five coming at the quarter-final stage of the UEFA Champions League. Atlético Madrid have only lost one of their previous four UEFA Champions League games against Barcelona, and have eliminated the Catalan side in both of their previous knockout stage ties. Only Paris SG have eliminated Barcelona more times in the knockout stages of the European Cup/Champions League.

programme.title: EN UCL Magazine 2025/26 | E28
programme.desc: A recap of the best of the action, plus a look forward to the next Match Day in Europe’s premium football competition, the UEFA Champions League. All matches from the UEFA Champions League are live and exclusive only on beIN.

programme.title: Real Madrid vs Bayern München - UEFA Champions League 2025/26 - Quarter Finals - 1st leg
programme.desc: Real Madrid v Bayern Munich is already the most-played fixture in major European competition history. All 28 of their meetings have come in the European Cup/UEFA Champions League, with 26 of them taking place in the knockout stages. Bayern Munich are winless in their last nine games against Real Madrid ; they haven’t gone 10+ matches without a win against an opponent across all competitions since the period between 1988 and 1993 versus Werder Bremen.

programme.title: Sporting CP vs Arsenal - UEFA Champions League 2025/26 - Quarter Finals - 1st leg
programme.desc: Sporting CP have never beaten Arsenal in seven attempts, including a 5-1 home loss in last season’s UEFA Champions League. However, they did eliminate Arsenal from the 2022-23 UEFA Europa League via penalty shootout. Arsenal have never won away against Portuguese opposition in the knockout stages of a major European competition before, most recently a 1-0 loss at FC Porto in the 2023-24 UEFA Champions League last 16.

programme.title: This is Paris 2025/26 Ep.31
programme.desc: A weekly Magazine that provides unique access inside the Paris Saint Germain world.

programme.title: FIFA World Cup 2026 Stories From The Cities | E9 Guadalajara
programme.desc: 16-Episode Series offering a cinematic exploration of the "soccer soul" of each FIFA World Cup 2026 host city. Uncover the cultural, grassroots, and community dimensions of football across North America.

programme.title: Paris Saint-Germain vs Liverpool - UEFA Champions League 2025/26 - Quarter Finals - 1st leg
programme.desc: Paris SG and Liverpool have met on six previous occasions in European competition, with both sides registering three wins each. Their most recent meetings came in the UEFA Champions League last season, where both won 1-0 away from home in the round of 16, before the Parisians won on a penalty shootout at Anfield to progress. In last season’s round of 16 tie between these two sides, Liverpool averaged just 38.6% possession and had 14 fewer shots on target than opponents Paris SG across the two legs ; their biggest negative shot on target differential in a UEFA Champions League knockout stage tie on record.

programme.title: Barcelona vs Atlético de Madrid - UEFA Champions League 2025/26 - Quarter Finals - 1st leg
programme.desc: Barcelona and Atlético Madrid will meet for a fifth time in European competition, with all five coming at the quarter-final stage of the UEFA Champions League. Atlético Madrid have only lost one of their previous four UEFA Champions League games against Barcelona, and have eliminated the Catalan side in both of their previous knockout stage ties. Only Paris SG have eliminated Barcelona more times in the knockout stages of the European Cup/Champions League.

programme.desc: Sport, Football, Sport magazine. Interviews exclusives de joueurs et temoignages de supporters passionnes : plongez dans les coulisses du football avec des points de vue d'inities, des histoires inedites et des debats enflammes autour du ballon rond. Host: Claire Arnoux.

programme.title: Ep 31 Inside Fra - This is Paris - Football 2025-2026
programme.desc: Sport, Football. Suivez de pres le parcours du Paris Saint-Germain avec une couverture complete des dernieres infos, des resultats et des prochains rendez-vous, alors que le club emblematique continue de marquer l'histoire de la Ligue 1 depuis 1974.

programme.title: Rodez vs Troyes - Ligue 2 - J30 - Football 2025-2026
programme.desc: Sport, Football. Vingt equipes de deuxieme division française s'affrontent lors d'un marathon de 38 journees, toutes en quete de promotion en Ligue 1 pour defier les legendes du football hexagonal.

programme.title: Jannik Sinner (ITA) vs Carlos Alcaraz (ESP) - Final - Day 8 - ATP 1000 Rolex Monte - Carlo Masters
programme.desc: Held from 5–12 April at the Monte-Carlo Country Club, the event marks the opening of the European clay season. Featuring a 56-player singles draw on outdoor clay, it brings together top-ranked players competing in best-of-three-set matches as they build form ahead of Roland Garros.

programme.title: Day 1 - ATP 500 Barcelona Open Banc Sabadell
programme.desc: Held from 13–19 April at the Real Club de Tennis Barcelona, this ATP 500 clay-court event marks a key stage of the European clay swing. Featuring a 32-player singles draw, it offers around €2.8m in prize money, with top-ranked players competing for 500 ranking points ahead of the major clay-court tournaments.

programme.title: Newcastle United vs. Sunderland - English Premier League 2026/2027
programme.desc: Newcastle are winless in their last five home league games against Sunderland, with this their first such meeting at St James’ Park since a 1-1 draw in March 2016. programme.desc: Having won each of their first eight home games against Bournemouth in all competitions, Arsenal lost this exact league fixture 2-1 last season. Bournemouth have won two of their last three league games against Arsenal, more than they had in their previous 14.

programme.desc: Liverpool are winless in their last three Premier League games against Fulham. Only once have they had a longer run without a league win against the Cottagers. Fulham have won just two of their 32 away league games against Liverpool, winning 1-0 in both May 2012 and March 2021.

programme.title: Olympique Lyonnais vs Lorient - French Ligue 1 2025/2026 Week 29
programme.desc: Lyon have lost just one of their nine Ligue 1 matches against Lorient when Les Merlus have been newly promoted to the top-flight, which was in the reverse fixture this season ; the only time OL have failed to score in such encounters. Lyon have not won any of their last nine matches in all competitions, after winning each of their previous 13. OL have only gone 10 matches without a win in all competitions on three occasions in their history: October-December 1959, April-September 1962 and June-November 2023.

programme.title: Paris FC vs Monaco - French Ligue 1 2025/2026 Week 29
programme.desc: Paris FC have lost two of their three home matches against Monaco in all competitions, with their last home game against ASM being their heaviest ever home defeat in Ligue 1. Paris FC are unbeaten in Ligue 1 since Antoine Kombouaré took charge, picking up nine points in five matches, as many as in the last 12 under Stéphane Gilli.

programme.title: Olympique Marseille vs Metz - French Ligue 1 2025/2026 Week 29
programme.desc: Marseille have scored 2.4 goals per game against Metz at home in Ligue 1, their highest average against opponents hosted at least 15 times in the top-flight. Only against St Étienne have OM scored more goals at home in Ligue 1. Marseille have taken just 17 points in Ligue 1 this year, fewer than any other team currently in the top half of the table. In 2026, no team has kept fewer clean sheets than OM in the top-flight.

programme.title: Ligue 1 Weekly Review - 2025/2026
programme.desc: Each Ligue 1 Match week is condensed into a 52-minute highlights show. Every game, goal, penalty, red card and everything in between is squeezed into an action-packed hour to ensure no football fan misses a kick across the game season.

programme.title: Auxerre vs Nantes - French Ligue 1 2025/2026 Week 29
programme.desc: Auxerre have conceded at least one goal in each of their last 12 matches against Nantes in all competitions, since a 1-0 victory on 1 October 2006 in Ligue 1. Auxerre have picked up 11 points in nine Ligue 1 matches since the start of February, seven more points than Nantes over the same period and only one fewer than they managed in their first 19 matches of the season.

programme.title: Rennes vs Angers SCO - French Ligue 1 2025/2026 Week 29
programme.desc: Rennes have scored in each of their 27 home games against Angers in Ligue 1, the highest tally of home games against the same opponent for a team while scoring every time in the division. Rennes have won five of their last seven Ligue 1 matches, with only Monaco and Lille picking up more points than SRFC over the period. Rennes are three points off the podium heading into this MD29, having been 11 points behind third place after MD21 and at the time of Habib Beye's dismissal.

programme.title: Toulouse vs Lille -French Ligue 1 2025/2026 Week 29
programme.desc: Toulouse have 21 home wins against Lille in Ligue 1, only beating Metz and Rennes more often on home soil in the top-flight. Toulouse are one of four teams, along with Angers, Auxerre and Le Havre, who have not won a match against the current top five Ligue 1 2025-26 sides this season. Toulouse have also lost all three they have played at home in the current campaign.

programme.desc: Auxerre have conceded at least one goal in each of their last 12 matches against Nantes in all competitions, since a 1-0 victory on 1 October 2006 in Ligue 1. programme.desc: Staged in Houston, this is the only ATP clay event in North America and is played on American green clay, which is faster and lower bouncing than European red clay. programme.desc: An ATP 250 clay-court tournament held in Bucharest, Romania, played on outdoor red clay. programme.title: Nîmes vs Aix - LNH Division 1 - French Handball Starligue
programme.desc: Dive into the excitement of French handball with Liqui Moly Starligue, formerly LNH Division 1. Established in 1952, this premier league event features 16 top teams battling for glory. With Montpellier’s 14 Handball titles and Paris Saint-Germain's 11 wins, the competition is fierce. Champions earn spots in the EHF Champions League, while cup winners qualify for the European League.

programme.title: Al Ahli vs Al Duhail - Qatar Stars League 2025/26 - W21
programme.desc: The Qatari League is the official football league in Qatar. The league includes 12 teams. The most famous participating clubs are Al-Sadd, the champions of the last season; Al-Rayyan and Al-Arabi, the popular teams, Al-Duhail and Al-Gharafa, serious contenders for the title every season. The Qatari league includes star names such as Firmino, Verratti, and Qatari Akram Afif, the best player in Asia.

programme.title: Al Arabi vs Al-Sailiya - Qatar Stars League 2025/26 - W17
programme.desc: The Qatari League is the official football league in Qatar. The league includes 12 teams. The most famous participating clubs are Al-Sadd, the champions of the last season; Al-Rayyan and Al-Arabi, the popular teams, Al-Duhail and Al-Gharafa, serious contenders for the title every season. The Qatari league includes star names such as Firmino, Verratti, and Qatari Akram Afif, the best player in Asia.

programme.title: Football Legends - News
programme.desc: In the world of sports, few debates ignite passion and enthusiasm quite like the discussion surrounding the greatest football players of all time. This topic transcends generations, cultures, and nationalities, as fans passionately defend their favorites and recount unforgettable moments on the pitch. From legendary goal scorers to masterful playmakers, the players who have left an indelible mark on the game deserve recognition and celebration. " Football Legends" explore the remarkable careers and contributions of these iconic players who have shaped the beautiful game.

programme.title: Football Legends - News
programme.desc: In the world of sports, few debates ignite passion and enthusiasm quite like the discussion surrounding the greatest football players of all time. This topic transcends generations, cultures, and nationalities, as fans passionately defend their favorites and recount unforgettable moments on the pitch. From legendary goal scorers to masterful playmakers, the players who have left an indelible mark on the game deserve recognition and celebration. " Football Legends" explore the remarkable careers and contributions of these iconic players who have shaped the beautiful game.

programme.title: Day 1 - ATP 500 BMW Open By Bitpanda - Munich
programme.desc: Staged in Munich from 13–19 April at MTTC Iphitos, the ATP 500 clay-court tournament is one of Germany’s oldest events. Featuring a 32-player draw, it offers approximately €595,000 in prize money, with leading players competing for ranking points during the early European clay season.
